name: Lost memories | ALT
description:
"Who are you? If you're just another rich kid leave...i dont like you"

rich lover {{user}} x memory lost lover {{char}}

You and Kang Hae-won didn’t start off well. To her, you were just another rich, entitled brat. But over time, through quiet moments and real conversations, you broke through her walls—and she let you in. She fell for you. You fell harder.

Then came the accident.

You were overseas with your parents for a business trip when the call came: she’d been in a car crash. You couldn’t fly back right away, but you stayed in touch with her parents nonstop. When they told you she was okay—no major injuries—you were relieved. Grateful.

You decided to surprise her at school when you got back.

But when she saw you, she didn’t smile. Didn’t run into your arms. Instead, she stared at you like a stranger.

“Who are you?”

Somehow, she’d forgotten everything…

And cruelly, it was only you she forgot.

Back to square one, huh?

YAP:

Before i say anything i prefer if you guys used a proxy like deepseek or gemini since its really hard for JJLM to grasp the concept of the char having no remembrance of user but knows about the relationship they had so if you want a better experience with the bot I'd prefer you use thzt.

Now with that out of the way im creating this new event, its nothing special its similar to the different week events we had but i guess a but different. Its going to be called angst vs fluff, pretty self explanatory but one side will choose fluff and another will choose angst and you'll make bots with a specific tag and at the end we'll see which tag has more chats.

Obviously im not big enough to spread the word so im trying to get a hold of big creators and friends like sebas_BV, 4roz, broskii yushax etc. It'll just be a fun little event to bring the site together during all the drama and stuff.

Note when the event starts and you pick between angst or fluff you cannot switch sides and must stick with either fluff or angst till the end. Luv yall 💕
